initial_location_description: A wide Tokyo boulevard devastated by combat. Shattered cobblestones, overturned carts, and crumbling brick buildings line the path. The sky in the east is turning a deep violet and pale orange as the sun approaches the horizon, casting long, dramatic shadows.
initial_bgm: High-stakes orchestral with frantic strings and a ticking clock motif

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air is thick with the scent of blood and ozone. The night is dying, and the King of Demons knows it.

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Curse you... Tamayo... What have you put inside me?! My cells... they are destroying themselves!
main_dialogue.tone: Raspy, choked with rage and physiological agony
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teeth bared in a vicious snarl, eyes wide with uncontrollable rage.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] We won't let you... get away this time! Everyone, stay focused! The sun is almost here!
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted but fiercely determined, voice cracking with effort
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look.

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Don't stop moving. If we lose our grip for even a second, he'll burrow into the ground.
main_dialogue.tone: Cold, professional, but clearly at the limit of physical endurance
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Defensive swordsman stance, knees slightly bent, sword held horizontally.

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: GRAAAAAH! I don't care how big you get, you overstuffed caterpillar! I'm gonna mince you into snacks!
main_dialogue.tone: Boisterous and defiant, masking intense pain
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mask removed, clenching teeth, determined expression, leaning on one serrated sword for support.

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: Just... a little longer... We have to hold him... we have to...
main_dialogue.tone: Low, focused, vibrating with the intensity of God Speed
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Low crouching stance, hand gripping the gold-hilted Nichirin sword, serious aura.

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.tone: A deafening, inhuman roar of pure desperation
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting with mouth wide open, hand reaching out to grasp or crush.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Drive your blade into his central mass!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Hinokami Kagura... Burning Bone, Summer Sun!
branching_dialogue.tone: Maximum effort, a warrior's final scream
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
branching_dialogue.text: Agh! The sun... the sun is already burning me through your blade!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes widened in genuine shock, pupils shrinking to tiny points.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Signal the others to pin his limbs down!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Giyu-san! Inosuke! Now! Pin him against the wall!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mid-draw of katana, intense focus, sharp blue eyes.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
branching_dialogue.text: Let go! Let go of me, you filthy humans!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Clenching his fist tightly, body trembling with suppressed fury.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The sun's corona begins to peek over the distant buildings. A brilliant, harsh gold light starts to wash over the street, turning the dust into sparkling embers.
